top_signals.title: Former Ambassador Cui On Stabilizing US-China Ties
top_signals.summary: Cui Tiankai, a former Chinese ambassador to the US, explains how the US and China should work toward "constructive strategic stability." Cui, who's also a former vice minister of foreign affairs for China, speaks to Bloomberg on the sidelines of the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: It is time for a European Security Council
top_signals.summary: Increasing US disengagement and continued Russian aggression have given the idea fresh impetus
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Submit your questions: Ten years on, what’s next for Brexit?
top_signals.summary: Take part in a live Ask an Expert Q&A with the FT’s Europe editor Ben Hall and Peter Foster, the FT’s World trade editor, on Thursday June 4, at 1pm BST

top_signals.title: US charges Google security engineer with Polymarket insider trading
top_signals.summary: A Google security engineer was charged with insider trading after winning $1.2 million using confidential company data to place bets on the cryptocurrency-based Polymarket decentralized prediction market. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
